name: t20_control_bot
description: T20 Control Bot for Telegram with auto-posting, welcome/goodbye messages, and channel management.

TELEGRAM_TOKEN.description: Your Telegram bot token from BotFather

CHANNEL_ID.description: The Telegram channel username or ID where the bot will post

ADMIN_IDS.description: Comma-separated list of Telegram user IDs allowed to use admin commands

SOCKS_PROXY.description: Optional SOCKS proxy URL, if needed
